note.zh: 在 Claude Code 2.1.219 中以 Claude Opus 5（xhigh 思考档位）一次生成，未经修改，耗时 76 分 34 秒，是本批三档里耗时最长的一次。裸 harness 运行：全部 skills、plugins、MCP 与外部设置源均已禁用，工具只保留 Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep。单文件体素幻想世界，Three.js 从 jsdelivr 加载。模型把代码拆成分片模块分别编写再拼装成单文件。
note.en: One-shot by Claude Opus 5 (xhigh effort) in Claude Code 2.1.219, unmodified, 76 minutes 34 seconds, the longest of the three effort levels in this batch. Run on a bare harness: all skills, plugins, MCP servers and external setting sources disabled, tools limited to Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep. A single-file voxel fantasy world with Three.js loaded from jsdelivr. The model wrote the code as separate module fragments and concatenated them into one file.

note.zh: 在 Claude Code 2.1.219 中以 Claude Opus 5（xhigh 思考档位）一次生成，未经修改。裸 harness 运行：全部 skills、plugins、MCP 与外部设置源均已禁用，工具只保留 Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep。模型自行把 SVG 渲染成 PNG 目视复核后再回改定稿。
note.en: One-shot by Claude Opus 5 (xhigh effort) in Claude Code 2.1.219, unmodified. Run on a bare harness: all skills, plugins, MCP servers and external setting sources disabled, tools limited to Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep. The model rendered its own SVG to PNG, reviewed it visually, and revised before finalizing.
